Posted 2 years ago and Steve Wakeman had my review deleted so posting again to give fair warning to potential clients.

Stay away from this firm and Steve Wakeman. He agreed to finish up some Rules to Show Cause that were already filed for back child support and medical bills for my children that my ex did not pay. My ex had been found in contempt numerous times for the same thing. We agreed on a flat price I would pay to litigate the rules so that I would be assured to come out of court with some money to take care of my kids with and not pay it all out in attorney fees attempting to get back child support. Steve Wakeman agreed to the set fee. While he was preparing I asked for billing so I would know where we were on expenses. Wakeman had stepped into case in January and worked for a couple of months. He never sent me a bill when I requested. So finally we are in court and he leans over and hands me bill and says he is going to put me on the stand to verify the billing as you can recover if you win the contempt charges. The bill was over double and more than I would get back in child support. I told him no and this was not what we agreed to. He said don't worry, your ex will have to pay it, not you. The judge's ruling comes back and it is so bad that an appeal was going to have to be done. I went back to Wakeman's office to discuss. Throughout the case he had been very cocky about himself and our position that we should win and how poor of a lawyer the opposing counsel was. So in his office I am discussing the ruling that was not a favorable outcome for me and my children. And he is still talking about how bad of lawyer the opposing counsel is.  He then left his office and he slammed his door and never returned. Left me sitting there. Would never return a phone call or email. Left me with less than 30 days to get an appeal on file and I had to find a new lawyer to get up to speed and draft the appeal. Very unprofessional and unethical behavior by Steve Wakeman. I got another attorney to draft and win an appeal and then Wakeman and his firm thought they should sue me for the money I got in the appeal years later after he cost me the appeal and I recovered no money for the lawyer fees to actually do the appeal. They filed court documents with absolute lies in it and never owned up to his trickery and lies. Due to the legal and appeal process, these facts were not able to be included in the court case. Only facts from the circuit court record could be put in the appeal. I find Steve Wakeman and his firm to be one of the most unethical firms I have ever dealt with. I would not trust him for one second as he has his own agenda. Do some research on him. There are Journal Star articles on him that you may want to read as well where a judge reprimands him.
--

reviews.text: I've been blessed to be able to refer clients with Illinois needs to this firm for years.  All my referrals have the best experience and I wouldn't refer to anyone else!

Robert Porter does an excellent job. I highly recommend him for your estate needs.

Robert helped us create a will and trust (long overdue).  We appreciated how much time he took explaining all the details and legal language in the documents. He provided a draft and created a final document in a timely manner.

After a bad experience with a previous probate lawyer, we looked at google reviews of many lawyers. Mr. Porter caught our eye since he had a good review from a judge.

It was even more difficult since my sister had just died which precipitated me taking over my mother's estate as well as executing my sister's.

After speaking to him and two other probate lawyers, we chose Mr. Porter.

It was a great decision. Mr. Porter is very efficient, very clear on time lines and explains things very clearly when asked. He made great use of email and billed for these emails extremely fairly. He was very supportive during this very difficult time. He prioritized necessary actions, e.g., placing the notice to creditors as soon as he could.

His assistant, Deanne, is also awesome. She would return emails and phone calls very quickly. She would also answer any questions she could. If she couldn't answer them, she'd get the answers and respond in a timely manner. She was also very kind and supportive during this awful time.

From what I can tell, Mr. Porter got the estates running and closed within the minimum time possible.

If you are in the unfortunate position of needing a probate lawyer, Mr. Porter should be at the top of your list.

Robert Porter and Costigan & Wollrab staff are highly recommended. Mr. Porter provided legal services as our subdivision went through some issues and starting a new HOA. His help in the legal process was much appreciated and he provided clarity in the legal details of our journey. The staff were always courteous and professional.

Robert was a huge help as we established a will and trust. He was attentive and  knowledgeable. He was thorough and efficient - and accommodated our schedules.

Highly recommend if you want to feel secure in your decisions. We started knowing very little but learned a lot quickly.
Robert was amazing to work with, always super responsive, and truly made a difficult situation so much easier on our family! I would definitely recommend him to anyone!

reviews.text:
I can’t say enough good things about the Johnson Law Group, but specifically Doug and Mark Johnson. I came to Doug facing a class x for possession of marijuana with intent to deliver, a class 3 felony for possession of a controlled substance with intent to deliver and a class 2 felony for possessing a machine gun. Doug was very straight forward and honest throughout the entire process. He kept me updated, and his secretary was always reaching out when needed.

Doug was able to have my case settled with a reduction of the class x felony to a class 1, and was also able to get the class 3 and 2 felonies completely dropped from the case. Doug was also able to get us a plead deal for the class 1 felony of possession of marijuana with intent to deliver, with a mandatory 90 days served in county jail and four years probation. This was a huge win for my case and I can’t thank Doug enough for the hard work and dedication he had towards my case. I would not hesitate to recommend this law group to anyone!
reviews.ownerResponse: Branden. The work that we put in was well worth the end result. Mark and I appreciate getting to know you and we are very happy with the outcome in your cases. Keep your head up and good luck with your future endeavors!

reviews.text:
I recently referred a difficult criminal matter to Mark Johnson and Doug Johnson, from The Johnson Law Group, in which my client was arrested and charged with domestic battery.  I am not a criminal attorney and knew these charges were very serious and out of my expertise, but I wanted to help the accused and his family. As often happens in these difficult situations, the alleged incident occurred on a Saturday night, and my client landed in jail over the weekend.  He was not allowed to talk to his parents or me over the weekend while he was in jail to discuss what had occurred.  I left Mark Johnson a message through the firm’s website and he called me on a Sunday morning to discuss the case and further strategize.

There is a big difference between civil law and criminal law and I am so thankful I chose these criminal law experts to handle this matter instead of trying to handle it myself. Both Mark and Doug Johnson have extensive criminal law experience and were extremely professional in how they conducted themselves with me, my client, the police and court personnel.  Their work on this matter was stellar.

I highly recommend this group and would not hesitate to call them on any criminal matter.  Bottom line – thanks to the amazing and aggressive work of Mark Johnson and Doug Johnson, the charges against my client were completely dropped.

reviews.text:
Do not be fooled by their lies. They will be all smiles and promises and tell you a price that will "take this case through to the end". They will not pressure the prosecution to give all of the needed materials in discovery.
They will have you sign a contract that explicitly outlines what they will do for you with the agreed upon price, going into great details that other incurred fees are your responsibility and a full third of the contract is about how they will pursue you legally to get these fees. What it does not detail or even mention is what happens when THEY breach this contract. And they will.
The week before the trial date, they'll call you into their office for a "meeting". It's at this time, when your back it to a wall and you don't have options left, that they will present you with a new contract for the same amount or higher price that they need to move forward. And if you bring up the fact that they are in breach of the original contract, they will scoff and point out there is now penalty for them in breaching the deal.
My advice is to avoid this law group like the plague and if you do do business with them make sure the contract you sign with them outlines penalties from their side if they breach it.
And they will breach it.

My apologies, I was using a pseudonym for this vague warning to those who may unwittingly hire your firm. I would be more that happy to give my real name and full details as to why your firm simply can't be trusted.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jeff, we have reviewed our client database, and have no record of representing anyone by your name.  Perhaps you were represented by a different Law Firm. Nonetheless, we wish you the best.

He approached the opposing insurance company aggressively and within 6 months we had what I thought to be a fair agreement to a settlement offer. His paralegal Brady was informed of all details as Chase was on the case. Brady is an outstanding paralegal and if Chase was in court or on another case he was working on Brady knew every detail and was completely able and ready to answer any questions that I had about my case. reviews.text: Although my case had a few bumps and twists throughout, Mr. Lefante and the staff made sure to communicate with me throughout the process and were very easy to contact. Mr. Lefante even setup a time for me to discuss my concerns at 7pm as I was in class or school during their normal office hours. They followed through with what we had discussed when I had reached out for their services and I couldn’t be happier.

I have been through an extremely difficult circumstance and desperately needed legal representation. I originally had another attorney who not only gave me next to no consideration but also did is less than stellar job. I had to dismiss the attorney and felt completely scared… lost. I immediately contacted Lefante Law and was immediately put at ease. I knew from the start that I was in good hands. I never expected a legal team to show as much care, compassion and professionalism as Jim, Jen and the team. I feel blessed, the firm settled my lawsuit in a timely manner. The road to the settlement was an eye opener in the sense that I’ve learned more than ever you can’t trust everyone…but I can assure you that you CAN trust Jim, Jen and the other members of Lefante Law. If I did not understand something and/or was confused, they were kind enough to speak with me through whatever form of communication I requested weather it be email, phone, or in person and for those reasons I will continue to go to LeFante Law Offices if a future issue should arise and I will continue to highly recommend this office to everyone who needs not just a good lawyer, but a Great Law Office!

reviews.text: Jeff is the absolute best in the business, my only regret is not hiring him sooner. I have, and continue to refer him to anyone I know that needs representation. I promise you having Jeff in your corner gives you the greatest chance for success. reviews.ownerResponse: We notify all of our clients via email if there has been a change in court dates. All of our clients have our individual/personal cell phones to contact us 24/7.  We regularly go into court early to accommodate clients' schedules, and we send detailed updates.  Many times, Clients do not check their email accounts and we encourage them to call us in the week leading up to their scheduled court date.  We are sorry if this process failed you, but we do not have you down as a prior client.  So if this is a fake name you posted under, then contact my office and provide us with the feedback personally. We would love to make this right with you, if you were, in fact, a client of ours.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are very sorry that you felt you received no help from Prairie State Legal Services.  We do help thousands of people each year, but demand for legal aid services outpaces our ability to provide the level of help that every eligible person may need.  We try to address the most urgent issues that affect personal safety, adequate housing, access to medical care and similar problems to the extent possible. We involve volunteer attorneys to help us to expand our services. There are times when we simply lack staff or volunteers to provide the help needed. We hope we may be able to assist you in the future.

I cannot speak highly enough about Mr. Terry Dodds and the exceptional representation he provided during one of the most difficult times for our family. A family member was facing a serious Class 3 criminal charge, and from our very first meeting, he approached the matter with confidence, strategy, and complete professionalism. Through his deep understanding of the law, careful preparation, and strong advocacy, he was able to have the charge reduced to a misdemeanor an outcome that truly changed the trajectory of their future. At every stage, he was transparent, responsive, and reassuring, making sure we understood the process while fighting tirelessly on their behalf. His courtroom presence is commanding yet composed, and it’s clear that he is highly respected within the legal community.

Beyond his legal skill, what truly sets him apart is his network and reputation within the court system. He has established strong professional relationships and knows how to navigate negotiations with the prosecution strategically and effectively. The way he handled meetings, discussions, and plea negotiations demonstrated experience and credibility that only come from years of dedication and integrity in practice. Prosecutors and court staff clearly regard him with respect, which makes a real difference when advocating for a client. Most importantly, he is not only an outstanding criminal defense attorney but also an exceptional person ~ compassionate, trustworthy, and genuinely invested in the well-being of his clients. I am beyond grateful for his work and would recommend him without hesitation to anyone in need of top-tier criminal defense representation.

reviews.text: I didn’t feel like he was fighting on my behalf, at the moments I felt like he was not paid by me to defend me but I paid him to defend the county. Before I hired him as my attorney, he was pretty well explanatory but after that every time I talked to him may be once in a few months, I felt push back and resistance to each and every point I raised to help dismiss my case or bring it to a lower level. Most frustrating part was my case lingered on for almost 7+ months. That’s being said, I would strongly suggest to look for another competent  traffic lawyer in that county and save additional stress for yourself.
reviews.ownerResponse: Very sorry you had such a negative experience Rizwan. I am sorry that you felt that your outcome should have been better than what it was. Personally, I thought it was a pretty good outcome given what you were charged with. Perhaps a dismissal and an apology was the only outcome that would have been acceptable to you. Sadly, your case also took as long as it did was because I was trying as hard as I did to get a fair resolution for you. Reviewing the court file, it also appears it was closer to 5 months, not the 7 you have represented here. Be well Sir. I wish you the best.

.I cannot express enough gratitude for the outstanding legal representation provided by Jeff W. Lindsay, Esq. in my recent tenant injury case. From start to finish, Jeff demonstrated exceptional expertise, dedication, and professionalism, ensuring a successful outcome that cleared me of any liability.
Throughout the process, Jeff's communication skills were unparalleled. He kept me informed every step of the way, promptly answering any questions or concerns I had. His ability to explain complex legal jargon in layman's terms was truly appreciated, making me feel confident and informed throughout the entire journey.
Not only is Jeff a remarkable attorney, but he also displayed genuine care and empathy towards my situation. He understood the emotional toll this case had on me and my family, and his unwavering support made a significant difference during a difficult time.
In the end, I am thrilled to say that Jeff W. Lindsay's expertise and dedication led to a resounding victory. The case was dismissed, and justice was served. I can now put this ordeal behind me, thanks to Jeff's exceptional legal skills and unwavering commitment to my case.
If you are in need of legal representation, I wholeheartedly recommend Jeff W. Lindsay, Esq. His competence, professionalism, and empathetic approach truly set him apart as an outstanding attorney. I am forever grateful for his services and confidently award him 5 stars.
Jeff did an outstanding job on my case and I would highly recommend him.

Let me start out by saying that family law issues are emotional. Jeff will take the time to discuss all options, review all possible outcomes, help you prioritize objectives and tailor a strategy to achieve your goals. Family law is a complicated branch of civil law that deals with family matters that can be stressful and overwhelming. Jeff represented me with the utmost integrity, as well as protected the rights and best interests of my child during all the proceedings. His goal was to help me achieve the fairest outcome possible in my situation while minimizing the emotional stress that came from my difficult situation. Jeff was accessible, approachable, and committed to giving me the personal attention in my case that I deserved. Jeff is a trustworthy attorney and will fight until the end to achieve your goals! Guaranteed!  He understands the emotional turmoil of going through a difficult child custody case. The communication, overall support and professionalism was consistent throughout the time I worked with Jeff.
Despite the difficult circumstances it was a pleasure working with Jeff.  Not only was he professional, attentive to all my questions, knowledgeable, timely, and circumspect but he was also very personable and easy to talk with. He did a great job preparing me for what to expect, next steps in the proceedings and also in helping me to navigate and understand the whole process. I am so thankful for all his hard work in my case and I definitely will work with him again if the need arises. I highly recommend Jeff Lindsay!!

I hired Heather Calvert in June 2025 and I talked with a paralegal and was told they would take the case. Since there have been two new paralegals handling the case. I tried calling 12 times beginning day of hearing to see how she thought we did. I was told every time she's not in office, she's in court etc. I called two days ago to let her know I was approved and got yet another new paralegal who said he would have her call me back. Here we are yet again with no contact. I called today and receptionist said she's in office and she would give her a message. She said she was getting all my messages. Yet I STILL have not received a call back. She's getting $9,250 for one 20 minute briefing call and to just show up on my hearing call? Talk about unfair to a disabled person. I'm about to file a formal complaint. Starting with better business bureau. Then I will keep going until I get justice! This is so unfair to the disabled community. Zero communication. If I pay someone over $9,000 I expect to have some interaction and get questions answered or at least return phone calls.

reviews.text: Had to redo my will.

If I could leave a negative 10 star review, I would. The GAL in my case dropped the ball when we needed him most. Now my daughter is being charged with a felony because my ex wife reactively abuses her. Anyone with half a brain could see the mother has mental health issues and a personality disorder. A simple psychological evaluation of both mother and daughter would have revealed who is the perpetrator of the abuse and the power dynamics at play in a Narcissistic mother's home. The child has no power and no control with a mentally ill mother. If my ex wife kills my daughter or my daughter kills  herself then I will have the incompetent lawyer from your office  at Grace's funeral as a Paul Bearer. So it will be the last time he will let my daughter down. Luckily my daughter is now safe and sound in my care. Protected from her abuser and where she belonged all along. Its unfortunate that I was disrespected and smear campaigned instead of helped by your law firm. Now my daughter, who suffered from both mental and physical illness is now get proper treatment and medical care under my direction. She was incapacitated and then severely abused by her mother.The difference between competency and incompetency is having the holy trinity of intelligence. Common sense, Logic and Reasoning. Which are gifts clearly the lawyer from your office does not possess. Instead, he pushed his personal agenda of reuniting mother and daughter which is like putting dynamite and gasoline over a lit stove. My exwife suffers from severe mental illness and wears many masks to keep her mental illness and dysfunction  under wraps and hidden from the public. Its unfortunate that the GAL from this office could not see this or did not want to see after being rewarded thousands of dollars in compensation. Sad that the lawyer in your office receives high compensation and has low accountability. ***Update my daughter was finally removed from the mother's home. 4 years later and finally closure. No thanks to your law firm.***
reviews.ownerResponse: The attorney is often appointed by the courts to represent the interest of children in various cases, and in those instances, a parent who was not represented by our office may be disappointed with the report made to the court if it is not supportive of their position.  Such reviews by non-clients are not reflective of legal ability and ignores many contributing factors that may exist such as counselors and medical professionals, the attorneys representing the parties, their own conduct and ultimately that the Judge makes the final decision when the parties cannot agree.

reviews.text:
# Testimonial for Joel Brown, Attorney at Law

I recently hired Joel Brown to represent me in a wrongful death case, which was an incredibly difficult and heartbreaking experience. From the very beginning, Joel demonstrated a level of understanding and compassion that went far beyond typical legal representation.

Recognizing the emotional weight of the case, Joel was exceptionally kind and patient with me. He understood that discussing the details would be challenging and approached our conversations with remarkable sensitivity. Joel's commitment to my case was evident in his thorough research, carefully examining similar past cases to build the strongest possible legal strategy.

What truly sets Joel apart is not just his legal expertise, but his genuine compassion for his clients. Throughout our time working together, Joel became more than just my attorney—he became a friend. His dedication, knowledge, and empathetic approach made an incredibly painful process more bearable.

To anyone who is unsure about pursuing a legal case, I cannot recommend Joel Brown highly enough. Even if you're uncertain about the merits of your situation, I encourage you to reach out to him. His willingness to listen and provide thoughtful guidance is truly exceptional.

Thank you, Joel, for everything you've done.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jeanette, such a journey we have been on together. It has been a privilege to help you and your family. Thank you for such a kind review. Be well and don't be a stranger!

I highly recommend Brave Law Center, Amanda Stanley and staff to anyone who needs a law firm that genuinely cares about their clients and delivers results.

BH

Jason was the 3rd lawyer I met with while going through my divorce.  He and the staff at Brave showed me kindness and compassion- something that I did not encounter with the other lawyers I had previously had on retainer.
Brave Law gave me confidence that I would receive the best outcome in my case.  I appreciated their expertise and advise.  I have recommended them to several people going through different legal cases.

I had a great experience working with Amanda Stanley on a family law case. She was extremely knowledgeable, always quick to respond to any questions I had, and helped me secure the legal contracts I needed for my case. Their professionalism and support made a stressful process much easier. Highly recommend!
Amanda Stanley guided us through our father’s estate closing. She was kind and efficient. We were thankful to have her guidance and expertise.
Amanda has helped us with our case even though I was on the other side she did make sure that I was comfortable with agreements and follow the course of the law. She has been great!

A close family member of mine was in need of traffic law and divorce law assistance. Seeking Jason + Amanda at Brave Law has been great and they are EXCELLENT people to speak with when it comes to legal advice.

Jason’s expertise was able to timely resolve my family member’s traffic law issue with no pain at all. Jason’s partner, Amanda, sounds like she’ll be able to aide my relative with the help they need regarding divorce law.

Their office is nice, clean, and professional and their supporting staff are very friendly as well! 10/10 rating!

We were in urgent need of assistance with estate planning for my sister-in-law. The staff and attorney were kind, compassionate and efficient. They went above and beyond to work us into their schedule. We were very pleased with their services and highly recommend them.

Attorney Amanda Stanley was indeed the best attorney I've ever had. She didn't make me waste my time and took care of my case as quick as possible in the time she said she would. I highly recommend her. I was impressed and I did let her know what a great job she did. No extensions or anything.
Brave Law helped me through my divorce. Amanda Stanley was great she was patient with explaining things to me and updated me on any changes to paperwork. I would highly recommend.

Amanda worked on my divorce case and I was very pleased with all of her input, assistance and professional advice. She was prompt on returning phone calls and emails, very knowledgeable about the process and literally held my hand through the entire thing. I am so grateful for her kindness, support and professional help. I would definitely recommend Brave Law Center to anyone looking for attorney services.
Amanda is great! She gets stuff done and will answer any questions and helps out in every way possible!

Brave Law has represented me now for nearly 9 years with varying needs.  I've worked with both Jason and Amanda throughout those years and have found their service to be useful in navigating the difficult and complex world of family law, in particular to divorce cases.  Anyone going through the unfortunate event of a divorce, I recommend having attorneys in your corner.  I am glad I had Jason and Amanda in mine.

I contacted Brave law firm for a speeding  ticket I received in Peoria ill.  Jason Netzley did a phenomenal job explaining everything to me, so I knew all the possible outcomes. If I ever need a attorney I will definitely call them.  Cheyenne  the legal assistance was amazing as well. Thank you so much for everything your whole team did.
Brave Law approached my situation with a team approach, kept me up to date on the status and limited the time I needed to take away from work to resolve.  I highly recommend!

Mr. Netzley and the team were a great group of people. Throughout the process they were understanding and kind. I was able to setup a payment plan that worked for me, that allowed me to have a fresh start. I will highly recommend them every chance I get.

Amanda handled my very complicated parenting plan case. She was incredibly thorough in writing up the plan and in organizing and categorizing the binders full of evidence that I provided. She was responsive when I had questions or when other issues came up during litigation. Even though we didn't get everything we wanted, she was still able to secure the most important things, which were specific protections in the plan to ensure my childrens' safety.

Got a speeding ticket 21-25 over. Jason was extremely professional and friendly. All told, I spent approximately $900 to have the ticket virtually "taken care of"

Yes, $900 is a lot of money to a lot of people, but if you consider the amount of money that I would have spent on increased insurance prices over 4-5 years, $900 is one helluva deal. Easiest $900 I have ever spent.

The ticket was dealt with in a manner that I expected from an experienced professional who kept me 100% apprised throughout the entire process.

I recommend 5 stars all day long and plan to visit Mr Netzley in the future should I ever have the need to.

I'd like to extend a very special thank you to the absolutely amazing legal team at Brave Law Center for assisting me with a very personal and critically time-sensitive legal matter. The professionalism, knowledge, sense of urgency, empathy and compassion demonstrated by Attorneys Amanda Stanley and Jason Netzley, and the entire support staff, was appreciated more than words can express. I certainly would not hesitate to retain the Brave Law Center Team for any future legal service needs. I offer the highest of recommendations for this firm! 5 Stars!
Jason made everything very simple and easy for me. Would definetly recommend!!
Amanda Stanley is an excellent attorney.  She listened to our situation and worked with us to set the best path forward.  I highly recommend her.

I can not express how thankful I am to Mr. Netzley and the other staff at Brave Law. Everyone was so nice and beyond helpful, I don't know what I would have done without them. This is my first time I've ever dealt with a lawyer and I was kinda scared out of my mind when we first met, but Mr. Netzley was so nice and worked towards keeping me calm while also not sugarcoating anything which I really appreciated. While a little pricey I still highly recommend working with them. They were even able to work my court date/time so that I wouldn't need to skip class.

I cannot thank Attorney Amanda Stanley and the rest of the staff at Brave Law Center enough. If you are looking for an attorney that will listen to your story, remain empathetic, and involve you throughout the entire process while still being diligent, this is the place. You will get to work directly with your attorney; not be shoved off to other people in the office. After a short time of working with Amanda, I knew that she understood my goals and saw that she had taken them on as her own. We discussed every single avenue and what it could look like and developed a plan of action from there. Throughout the course of my case, there were multiple hurdles we had to cross (not due to Brave Law), which often changed our course but nothing was ever decided unless I was involved in the decision process. They are sharks and I would choose them again every time!
This office was awesome.  Everyone was professional.  Mr. Netzley really listened to my story and worked to get me the best outcome.
Amazing support for any legal needs! Highly recommend!

After 6 long years of being caught in Canton's Lutheran Social Services system for failure to thrive as an infant. My Cousin Ruebynn is finally being reunited to his (our) biological family and his Mother. Please know that his mother works, has her own home, no men in her life and doesnt have any substance abuse or alcoholism problems. She is now a mature young lady who deserves and has deserved her son but yet LLSI would not put reunification on the table or give her a chance . There were lots of tears shed by my family, lots of sleepless nights, and thousands of dollars spent on lawyers. But he is coming HOME! No LSSI  involvement any longer and NO more being told when and how she can see her son. There were a village of people behind her this whole time and we NEVER gave up fighting. Thank you to the Lutheran Church of Canton and Brave Law Offices, my ENTIRE family, Crittinton social service, Angela Rupert-Hale and everyone that testified on my families and Noelle's behalf. Our God that all though we often wondered where he was sure showed his mercy and grace today. Its been a long time coming but finally JUSTICE FOR RUEBYNN has been served. Welcome home Rue! Your Foo Foo and Cousin Woogie love you sooooo very much! A welcome home celebration is in the works! I hope that everyone and anyone connected to my family will come celebrate this long over due miracle  REUNIFICATION come! More details to follow! <3 Melissa

I highly recommend this place because
My JA CASE lasted  6 long years, but as of today, my case got dismissed, and I now have full custody of my son. Jason and Amanda are expensive attorneys. However, these attorneys are worth every penny.

Amanda Stanley has been nothing but a blessing for me. As a single mom custody battles and even divorces can be challenging. Amanda made everything possible and met all of my needs. She communicated constantly and listened to all of my concerns. I will never use another lawyer. Thank you for all you have done.

I don’t know if I could recommend a place as much as I recommend this one. Amanda Stanley is an absolute powerhouse of an attorney.

Three years ago, I had a different attorney, limited visitation rights to my daughter, and left every court date frustrated and upset. Today, I have custody of my daughter to which she lives with me and even goes to school using my address. I could not have done this without Amanda and everyone at that office. She took a chance on me when other lawyers within town literally hung up on me telling me that I was wasting their time asking for representation in my case.

Amanda, Jennifer, Jason, and everyone in that office treats you like family when you are their client. The office and décor are very laid back. Amanda makes sure you stay up to date on everything happening, she answers any calls or emails in a timely manner, and she will always go to bat for you. She is professional, honest, and caring. Even with as strong of an attorney as the other side had, Amanda never faltered. She stood her ground and was always able to find a way to maintain control in the court room. You can tell she meticulously plans everything she is going to argue and every rebuttal that may be brought up. If there is one phone number to have saved into your phone, it should be that of Brave Law.

Amanda was the best choice for not only myself, but my child. I cannot thank them enough to the help.

Thank you again.

I recently found it necessary to hire an attorney to represent me in a dispute with a former employer.  Athena Herman came highly recommended by other attorneys.
During our initial consultation she explained the entire process of filing a complaint, chances of compensation, fees involved, and length of time to come to a settlement.
She kept me informed during the entire process, consulted me through all negotiations, and was always available to answer any questions.
I received a fair settlement due to her knowledge and negotiation expertise. I highly recommend Athena Herman.

I hired Heather Calvert in June 2025 and I talked with a paralegal and was told they would take the case. Since there have been two new paralegals handling the case. I never got to speak to Heather during entire experience except for 20 minutes two weeks before hearing for a briefing. I had my hearing which she barely said anything. I tried calling 12 times beginning day of hearing to see how she thought we did. I was told every time she's not in office, she's in court etc. I called two days ago to let her know I was approved and got yet another new paralegal who said he would have her call me back. Here we are yet again with no contact. I called today and receptionist said she's in office and she would give her a message. She said she was getting all my messages. Yet I STILL have not received a call back. She's getting $9,250 for one 20 minute briefing call and to just show up on my hearing call? Talk about unfair to a disabled person. I'm about to file a formal complaint. Starting with better business bureau. Then I will keep going until I get justice! This is so unfair to the disabled community. Zero communication. If I pay someone over $9,000 I expect to have some interaction and get questions answered or at least return phone calls.

I highly recommend anyone looking to start a personal injury or workers comp case to talk to Doug and his team. Thank you for your hard work!

reviews.text:
I would like to share my experience for the benefit of both the firm and future clients.

The intake process was a very challenging. I needed to call back to provide my correct contact information, and it was sometimes difficult to hear, so if they repeating details may have been helpful as typos could be avoided.

I completed all requested information over the weekend. However, when my scheduled call with the attorney came, I did not receive the call at the expected time. I waited over 1/2 hour. I was later informed that the attorney had attempted to call about 1.5 hours afterward, but by then I was at work and unavailable.

The response from office would have helped with an apology and they would call me since of getting a very vague email that nothing was their 'fault'

The attorney assigned to me appears highly qualified based on the firm’s website and bio. At the same time, I noticed the specific area I was seeking support in was not clearly listed on the website as a focus of his practice or experience.

I learned after my 3rd call that the free intake session is limited 15 minutes, which provides only limited opportunity to ask questions or understand the attorney’s background in detail. It can make it difficult to fully evaluate whether the attorney is the right fit for representation.

I attempted to find a way to share this feedback directly with the owner but was unable to locate contact information.

I hope this feedback is received in the spirit intended—as constructive information that may help improve the client experience going forward.

reviews.text: I was involved in a motorcycle accident last year and was in need of a reputable and honest attorney. I talked to a few different lawyers and I decided that LeFante law was the best choice. My attorney was Chase and his paralegal was Brady. I was told from the beginning how they would approach the case and what to expect in the future of my case. Chase came out to my house on my property damage claim that I was going to handle myself. He was here when the opposing insurance people were here to observe what was being done and said. He did this on his own time with absolutely No money coming to him or the office. He approached the opposing insurance company aggressively and within 6 months we had what I thought to be a fair agreement to a settlement offer. His paralegal Brady was informed of all details as Chase was on the case. Brady is an outstanding paralegal and if Chase was in court or on another case he was working on Brady knew every detail and was completely able and ready to answer any questions that I had about my case. I’m over joyed that I went with LeFante Law Offices and absolutely 100 percent happy with the way Chase and Brady handled my case with great results and in a timely manner. I’m not going to lie though, I hope I hope I never need an attorney again but if I do I have LeFante law office on my contacts! I highly recommend them to anyone in need of legal assistance!

reviews.text:
AEL in 4 Words: Professional, Knowledgeable, Integrity, Indomitable

Angela and her team have been my rock throughout my difficult legal struggles. Her team has earned my utmost respect in their ability to diligently represent a client. I never thought I'd go through a divorce let alone have to fight for the right to be in my children's lives, but they were there for me when I needed them. I consulted numerous attorneys in the area before and after consulting with Angela. It was clear to me that no one would represent the long-term best interests of my children better.

In the past 2 years I've learned how ugly and complicated family law can truly become. Due to the design of the legal system, and constant curveballs in the case there have been times when I've felt as though this would never end. She never sugar-coated things and was diligent about making sure I was clearly aware of what was happening with the case as well as all potential outcomes. Without Angela's stalwart legal support, I don't believe I would have made it through everything.

Her paralegal, Cori, has always been available when I called or e-mailed. Both remain willing to listen to any concerns I have and consistently followed through on anything necessary. I understand that my case is not the only case the team handles, but everyone at AEL have never made me feel as though my children were not their # 1 focus.

In court, Angela's expertise and confidence is clearly on display. She is extremely knowledgeable of the law and stays on-point with matters of fact and evidence. She has stood up for me through unprofessional antics from the other side and I cannot thank her enough for her representation.

The words "ethical" or "integrity" are not commonly used when discussing attorneys, but it certainly applies to Angela Evens. If you're in need of a genuinely professional lawyer for your case, I can't recommend AEL enough.
Professional, listened, but did not execute.   When I explained what I wanted, she kept asking me "What would you have me do?"  --- That is why I thought I hired you! ..

I was very pleased with Angela Evans Law with my legal issues. Her representation was very professional and she always kept me informed as the case progressed.  I would highly recommend her and seek her legal assistance again if necessary in the future.

Had to seek Angela's representation for a 2nd time. Different case. Again very pleased with the outcome.  She was extremely  knowledgable of what needed to be done and how to get the best results for each case.
Absolutely recommend.

Angela helped us through a nasty custody case. She tried her hardest to fight for what we thought was right. She came into the middle/end of the case but still treated it like she had been with us from the very beginning. even though it didn’t go how we wanted, it still ended pretty good. We appreciate her and everything her office did!

I hired Joe and his team to help me with a DCFS appeal.  I tried to handle the case to being with, and was cooperating with the investigation thinking that the TRUTH would set me free.  Boy was I wrong!  With 50 years on the state registry hanging over my head, I knew I had to do something.  So I hired Joe, that is when I met his wonderful paralegal Denise who kept me informed, updated, and went well beyond her duties for me.  At the end of the day justice was served, and Joe walked around the attorney for DCFS.  It was sad that DCFS would rather ruin somebody's life than admit they did something wrong.  However thanks to Joe and Denise, after almost a year, I can start to get my life back.  I'd hire Joe for anything that I would need help with again, and would send people his way with out hesitation!

I had a great experience with Borsberry Law Offices. Joseph Borsberry and his team were professional, responsive, and made the process much less stressful. reviews.text:
He doesn’t deserve a star — he deserves a warning label.

I paid a $3,500 retainer for Joseph Borsberry to appear in court a couple of times and handle my case, but I received almost nothing in return—no meaningful updates, no real progress, and very little communication. After making additional payments that brought my total close to $4,000, he abruptly decided to withdraw from my case at the very end, leaving me stuck and scrambling to find new representation.

Let me be clear: his office does not communicate. Since my last court date on May 9th, I called 18 times—18 times—with no real answers, no support, and no indication anyone cared. Instead of doing the job he was paid for, Joseph filed a motion to withdraw and walked away like it was nothing.

He also has an irritating habit of constantly interrupting when you’re trying to talk, making it clear he has little interest in actually listening to your concerns. Meanwhile, his paralegal Denise once emailed me saying:
“This is a mess. BUT, we will get it straightened out. I will be honest with you, it probably won’t be over tomorrow. BUT, we WILL get it figured out and cleared up.”
Those were her exact words — and not a single part of that promise came true.

At one point after court, Joseph said,
“Is it really worth fighting for if there’s only a couple hundred dollar difference?”
Yes, Joseph — when it comes to child support, every dollar counts. That comment showed just how little he values his clients or the children involved.

Even more concerning, they never secured a financial affidavit from the opposing party, so they lacked the essential, accurate financial information needed. Instead, they were willing to base child support calculations on rough estimates—an approach that’s not just sloppy, but completely unacceptable for competent legal representation.

If you’re thinking about hiring him, don’t. He’ll take your money, waste your time, and leave you scrambling to fix what he failed to do. You’re better off representing yourself than trusting someone who won’t return calls, finish your case, or act professionally.

No suit—even a pinstripe one—can make sloppy work and lack of commitment look sharp.

Because he failed to do his job, I’m now forced to pay another attorney just to finish the work Joseph was originally hired to complete. He didn’t withdraw for any valid reason—he walked away because he didn’t like being called out for taking payment without delivering results. That’s not legal representation. That’s taking advantage of a parent doing their best to fight for their child.

And honestly? I hope he stubs his pinky toe on the sharpest corner of a coffee table — a small but satisfying dose of karma for the stress and disappointment he put me through
Should Of Looked More Closely To The Reviews.

reviews.text:
Alert: Authenticity Concerns

Joe, offers a $100 rebate to clients who leave positive reviews. This undermines the integrity of the review system.

Why Authentic Reviews Matter

Family law clients often make significant financial commitments (retainers of $3,000-$5,000) based on very limited information (30-minute consultations). Genuine reviews provide a small but crucial insight into an attorney's negotiation style, responsiveness and professionalism.

Ethical Implications

Paying for reviews probably violates the legal profession's code of ethics. No other attorneys are known to engage in this practice.

Broader Impact

Deceptive practices erode trust and undermine community reliance on review systems and make life harder for decades to come.

When you wait in a long line at the airport, realize it is because some jerk ruined the ease of getting on a plane for everyone for decades to come.  Every time you lose your keys or have to lock your door, it is because of selfish people that we even have keys.

Recommendations

1. Future clients: exercise caution and consider lower-rated reviews.
2. Report Joe to the ethics board.
3. Current clients:  Write two reviews, one exposing Joe and one getting the 100 rebate.
4. Treat other attorneys that do this the same way or this behavior may spread.
5. Joe B. and associates: stop this behavior.

reviews.text:
Title: Disastrous Legal Representation: A Cautionary Tale
Do not let the stars fool you. We hired him based on the stars, and he is nowhere near a 4-star level; more like a 0-star level. He had 44 reviews when we hired him, then someone gave him a bad review, and then he miraculously had 88 reviews in a very short time keeping his average at 4 stars.
In my recent experience with Borsberry Law Offices, I encountered incompetence that I never thought possible from a legal representative. In fact, I’m not sure his actions were not intentional. From start to finish, my interaction with this lawyer was nothing short of a train wreck, leaving me feeling betrayed and out of pocket.
First and foremost, the issue of financial exploitation cannot be overstated. Not only did Joe Borsberry fail to represent me competently, but he also charged exorbitant fees for services that were either subpar or non-existent. I was led to believe that communicating primarily with his paralegal would save costs, only to find out later that this was a ruse to get me to hire his firm. The paralegal would simply transfer the call to him (he consistently had not had a chance to read the emails yet), leaving me in perpetual frustration and confusion.
Moreover, the sheer negligence in handling essential guardianship and adoption paperwork is inexcusable. We were charged for preparing and filing documents that were never submitted, leading to dire consequences for our case. I did not find out he had not filed the paperwork until we fired him and hired a new law firm, and he had the audacity to bill us for letting him go.
The pinnacle of disappointment came during our court proceedings, where Joe Borsberry demonstrated a shocking lack of preparedness. His flippant dismissal of our loss as “the judge sure screwed you" speaks volumes about his inability to accept responsibility for his shortcomings. To add insult to injury, witnessing him engage in idle chatter with opposing counsel further underscored the sense that my case was trivial to him.
In hindsight, it is abundantly clear that entrusting Borsberry Law Firm with my legal matters was a grave error. His incompetence and disregard for his client's interests have left me emotionally drained. If given the chance, I would implore anyone considering his services to look elsewhere for competent and ethical representation. I regret he ever took our case.

Rob provided exceptional representation in a very serious criminal case that carried the possibility of a lengthy prison sentence. As the family advocate helping to bridge communication throughout the process, I had a close view of his work, and Rob was honest and realistic from the start he under-promised and over-delivered.
